message:
docs: add API doc comments to asx_status and rwlock headers

Add inline C-style doc comments to all public function declarations in
include/asx/asx_status.h (asx_status_category, asx_error_category_str,
asx_status_recoverability, asx_recoverability_str,
asx_status_recovery_action, asx_recovery_action_str,
asx_status_backoff_hint, asx_status_is_retryable, asx_status_is_cancel)
and include/asx/sync/rwlock.h (asx_rwlock_reset).

These comments clarify the purpose, return semantics, and usage scope
(e.g. test-only) of each function, improving discoverability for
contributors reading the headers directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
